text_original: recent update has bugs or something is different i have the premium subscription and now when I want to text it sends me to buy gems so now you have to pay for pro and buy gems? this app got greedy.
text_zh: 最近的更新有bug，或者有些地方变了。我订阅了高级会员，现在我想发消息时，它却让我去买钻石，所以现在既要付Pro的钱，还要买钻石？这个软件变贪心了。
reply_original: Hi there, I'm truly sorry for this! As a VIP, you should have unlimited chats and never need gems to text. This is a bug from the recent update, not greed. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID and Google Play receipt so we can manually restore your membership and fix this for you immediately!
reply_zh: 您好，对此我深表歉意！作为VIP，您应该享有无限聊天次数，且发送消息绝不需要消耗宝石。这是最近更新带来的一个Bug，绝非因为贪婪。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的 UID 和 Google Play 收据，以便我们为您手动恢复会员身份并立即解决此问题！
